# Virginia Approves AI Traffic Cameras for Pedestrian Safety

**TL;DR:** Virginia has authorized AI-powered cameras to help enforce traffic rules and improve pedestrian safety.

Virginia has enacted a law allowing AI cameras to be used for traffic enforcement with a focus on pedestrian safety. The technology enables automated monitoring of traffic violations and compliance with traffic rules. This represents a new enforcement tool that could reduce accidents in communities that deploy it.

**Why it matters:** Chesterfield residents could eventually see this technology deployed locally to improve road safety and reduce traffic violations at high-risk intersections.
